name: 26 fl oz Tall Tumbler Black - Room Essentials™
description:
Enjoy your favorite hot or cold beverages in this 26-Fluid-Ounce Tall Tumbler from Room Essentials™. Made with 20% post-consumer recycled plastic, this tall tumbler is designed in a solid black hue. Great for serving a variety of drinks, it's microwave safe for reheating and is also dishwasher safe for easy cleaning.

Room Essentials™: Everyday Value
